ideation: This sequence simulates the act of throwing an American football.  The animation will focus on the right arm's movement, with the left arm remaining relatively still for balance. The sequence will emphasize the winding-up and release phases of a throw. I'll use the two shoulder joints to create a natural-looking throwing motion, and check the existing examples to ensure the range of motion is realistic for the robot. Frame 1 will show a preparatory pose, with the right arm drawn back. Frame 2 will capture the peak of the throwing motion, with the arm extended. Frame 3 will show the arm following through after the release. Frame 4 will show a return to a neutral position. I will ensure smooth transitions between these frames.

frames.beat: right arm pulls back, ready to launch
the arm whips forward, releasing the ball
the throwing arm follows through its motion
both arms return to a relaxed state
